result: Let me verify the task statuses — there are still pending tasks (10-20), so I should NOT output RALPH_DONE. **Task 9 complete.** Here's a summary: **Leaderboard.svelte:** - Replaced emoji medals (`🥇🥈🥉`) with canvas-rendered shield insignias using `renderInsignia()` from `rank-insignias.ts` - `RANK_MAP` maps positions 0/1/2 to gold/silver/bronze ranks - `$derived` pre-computes data URLs for the top 3 insignias - `` tags with data URL sources replace the emoji `` elements - CSS `.medal` class replaced with `.insignia` class **GameOverResults.svelte:** - Removed trophy emoji div (`🏆` with `animate-trophy-bounce`), `trophySparkles` array, and all `.sparkle-dot` spans - Removed `.sparkle-dot` CSS animation - Added `CELEBRATION` particle burst (30-50 particles, gold + brand purple) fired at viewport upper-center on component mount via `GeometricParticleSystem` from pixi-app context - Auto-cleanup after 1600ms All HTML text and layout preserved in both components. `pnpm build` passes clean. Tasks 10-20 remain pending.
